inputs.text: A cinematic medium shot of a slim, angular ten-year-old boy standing at the edge where a narrow hard-packed rust-red (#8B4513) dirt path meets the shore of a wide, still freshwater pond, bathed in golden hour light (#FFB347) casting long warm tones across the scene. The pond stretches behind him with tawny-gold (#D4A437) translucent shallows revealing smooth pebbles beneath the surface, deepening to dark green-brown (#2F4F2F) at its center, the water reflecting bronze (#CD7F32) and copper-gold (#B87333) sky tones, jade-green (#3B7A57) lotus pads floating with mercury-like droplets and a half-open pale pink (#FFB7C5) lotus flower visible on the surface. The boy, Arjun, stands roughly four-foot-six, small for his age, with medium-brown skin (#8D5524) glowing with warm honey undertones where the golden light catches his left side while soft shadow sculpts the right side of his face. His messy black hair (#1A1A1A) with blue-black highlights falls in uneven tufts across his forehead, stirred slightly by a breeze. His large, expressive dark brown eyes (#3B1F0B) are framed by thick lashes, wide and luminous, cast downward toward the water with a fixed, pulled gaze. His brows are drawn inward and slightly upward, a faint crease across his forehead, lips pressed together and slightly parted, nostrils subtly flared. A small dark brown mole (#2B1B0E) sits on his left cheek. His thin frame shows visible shoulder blades beneath a faded blue shirt (#7B9BAF) — once vivid cobalt, now washed pale and salt-stained — hanging loose on his angular body, the fabric catching the breeze in a single ripple. He wears frayed khaki-brown shorts (#8B7355) ending above his knobby knees, bare feet with slightly splayed toes planted on the dusty packed earth. His shoulders are dropped and tense, his fingers curled inward against his palms in tight fists at his sides, healing pink scrapes (#E8A0A0) visible on his knees and palms. Dry grass borders the path on either side, greening as it nears the waterline. Dragonflies in electric blue (#0077BE) hover above the pond surface. The composition places Arjun in the left third of the frame facing slightly right in three-quarter view, the pond filling the background with its golden-hour reflections, warm light wrapping around him from the left while cool water-reflected fill light touches him softly from below. Pixar-style 3D, soft global illumination, polished cinematic quality. Color palette of warm bronze (#CD7F32), faded blue (#7B9BAF), medium-brown (#8D5524), tawny-gold (#D4A437), and dark green-brown (#2F4F2F).
